M E N U
ABOUT THE KANG NAM
Welcome to KANGNAM Japanese Restaurant!
Our restaurant is a favorite destination point for local sashimi and sushi fanciers and connoisseurs
because
our distinctive style, fusion and tradition, attentive service, a sense of cleanliness, elegant
ambience
, and competitive prices in the area.
Our goal is to provide our customers with an entire dining experience that exceeds their expectations on every visit, we do this by providing dedication to service, quality, and freshness along with expert and professional products that our customers will appreciate and remember.

top of page
KANG NAM JAPANESE RESTAURANT
MENU
LUNCH COMBO/LUNCH SPECIAL - 11:00AM ~ 6:00PM
APPETIZER
Edamame (에다마메)                   Fried Dumpling - 6pcs (튀김만두)                     Steam Dumpling - 6pcs (찜만두)
Sunomono (수노모노)                 Vegetable and Seafood with Vinegar Sauce      Tuna Tataki
Sushi - 5pcs                                      Sashimi (Tuna, Salmon & Flounder)                 Calamari Tempura - 8pcs
Shrimp Tempura - 4pcs               Seaweed Salad
SASHIMI
Regular - 3 Kinds of Sashimi with Side dishes, Rice and Miso soup
Deluxe  -  5 Kinds of Sashimi with Side dishes, Rice and Spicy Fish Soup
Special  -  7 Kinds of Sashimi with Side dishes, Rice and Spicy Fish Soup
Kang Nam  -  11 Kinds of Sashimi with Side dishes, Rice and Large Spicy Fish Soup
V.I.P  -  Flounder + Lobster + 12 Kinds of Sashimi with Side Dishes, Roe Rice and 2 Large Spicy Lobster Soups
Mega    -   2 lbs Flounder + Lobster + 13 kinds of Sashimi with Side dishes, Roe Rice and 2 Large Spicy Lobster Soup
활어 스페셜
1. 활어(광어) + 멍게 + 전복                                                2. 활어(광어) + 멍게 + 전복 + 우니                           3. 활어(광어) + 멍게 + 전복 + 우니 + 콘치
4. 활어(광어) + 멍게 + 전복 + 우니 + 콘치 + 해삼      5. 활어(광어) + 멍게 + 전복 + 우니 + 콘치 + 해삼 + 아마에비
6. 콘치 + 전복 + 우니 + 해삼 + 멍게 + 아마애비
SMALL PLATE
Corn Cheese (콘치즈)                                                                   Potato Croquette (감자고로케)                           Fried Tofu (두부튀김)
Small Al Bab (알밥)                                                                      Kimchi Pancake (김치전)                                       Sashimi Salad (사시미샐러드)
Hamachi Kama (하마치 가마)                                                   Steam Rice                                                                   Sushi Rice
Miso Soup                                                                               Salad w/Ginger Dressing
SASHIMI & SUSHI COMBO
Deluxe                                                                                                Special                                                                           Kang Nam
Sashimi Regular + Sushi Regular                                              Sashimi Deluxe + Sushi Deluxe                            Sashimi Special + Sushi Special
SUSHI
​

8pcs Sushi and California Roll                                                12pcs Sushi and California Roll
Special                                                                                            Kang Nam

KANG NAM JAPANESE RESTAURANT
THE RESTAURANT
Welcome to KANGNAM Japanese Restaurant!
Our restaurant is a favorite destination point for local sashimi and sushi fanciers and connoisseurs because our distinctive style, fusion and tradition, attentive service, a sense of cleanliness, elegant ambience, and competitive prices in the area.
Our goal is to provide our customers with an entire dining experience that exceeds their expectations on every visit, we do this by providing dedication to service, quality, and freshness along with expert and professional products that our customers will appreciate and remember.
